name: cpig-bool-refactor-07-smooth
description: CPigSmooth(sphere, radius=3) — gaussian-blurs the sphere's SDF. Exercises field_smooth_blur_impl (implicit_field.cpp:1867+) — gaussian-blur of an SDF is not expressible in libfive, so this ALWAYS produces a procedural composite. Phase 1 promoted this from PROCEDURAL closure to Kind::SMOOTH structured composite. evaluate()'s Kind::SMOOTH arm runs the same kernel-sample loop as the prior closure. The TEST GATE: did the smoothed-sphere field render? Visual: a slightly inflated sphere (smoothing rounds + grows the level set slightly).

checkpoints.name: smooth
checkpoints.description: Sphere (r=10) gaussian-smoothed with radius=3 (3x3x3 sample kernel). Visible as a sphere with subtly larger effective radius. Phase 1 Kind::SMOOTH structured composite via evaluate() kernel-sample loop.
